builders.subgoal: Author index.html with all required slots, KaTeX CDN tags, script load order.
Author styles.css with desktop-first layout and distinct visual treatments.

verification_summary: Shell hosts the input and output regions, has a clear title and h1, loads KaTeX (no MathJax), exposes the stable selectors. CSS provides distinct visual treatment for input/output/error and a desktop-first two-column layout.
